summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. Seven open PRs were kept as independent inventory items, two already-closed PRs were skipped with keep_closed, and two ready-for-maintainer items were routed to maintainer judgment.

actions.reason: Not a duplicate or low-signal closeout candidate on hydrated evidence; keep as an independent PR needing proof/review outside this shard.
Draft/broad feature work with failed proof is not eligible for close, merge, or fix planning in this job; keep independently classified.
Useful independent bug-fix candidate, but hydrated evidence does not support duplicate/superseded closure or merge preflight.
Independent useful contributor PR with remaining proof/merge-readiness concerns; no closure or merge action is safe in plan mode.
Already closed in live preflight state; no mutation planned.
Hydrated evidence points to maintainer review rather than backlog cleanup; require_human_for includes maintainer_signal.
Independent bug-fix PR with unresolved proof context and unavailable linked issue; no close or merge action is safe.
Already closed in live preflight state; no mutation planned.
Broad feature PR with explicit maintainer-review signal and active author follow-up; maintainer judgment is required.
Independent small PR with failed proof and review incompleteness; no duplicate/superseded/low-signal closeout evidence.

needs_human: #87333 is ready for maintainer review with proof sufficient and passing checks; maintainer signal is required before merge or close decisions.
#91093 is an XL broad feature PR marked ready for maintainer look with proof sufficient and active author follow-up; maintainer judgment is required.
